title: EthCC - De Tychey vs Touts
relevance_summary: Ticket scalping attempt using Gnosis Safe contracts to bypass non-transferability

prevention.rule: Block any tx that creates a Gnosis Safe contract and immediately interacts with an ERC721 contract.

red_flags: creation of Gnosis Safe contracts immediately after minting ERC721 tokens
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that creates a Gnosis Safe contract and immediately interacts with an ERC721 contract.
summary: Scammers attempted to bypass non-transferability of EthCC tickets by creating Gnosis Safe contracts and minting ERC721 tokens. This could have been detected and blocked by monitoring for the creation of Gnosis Safe contracts immediately after minting ERC721 tokens.
